app.subtitle: Collaborative shopping made beautiful. Sign in to start your lists.
app.config_step1: Enable Google & Anonymous in Firebase Auth Console
app.sign_in_required_ad: Sign in to earn fuel from ads

app.join_ref_fail: Could not join shared list. Please check your configuration.
app.network_error: Firebase connection failed. Check your network.

fuel.consumed_info: Fuel is consumed starting from the oldest non-expired batch.
fuel.refuel_subtitle: Keep your tank full to sync
fuel.cooldown_notice: Refueling via ads and gifts has a cooldown to ensure fair usage.

reward.daily_prize_desc: Your daily fuel boost is ready. Keep moving!

redeem_modal.title: Redeem Coupon
redeem_modal.info: Fuel units will be added to your tank instantly upon successful redemption.
redeem_modal.free_desc: Get fuel units for free to start your journey!
redeem_modal.free_success: Congratulations! Fuel units added to your tank.
redeem_modal.mobile_invite: Claim your free fuel gift on our website!

auth.already_in_use_message: That Google account already has a ListShare profile. We've logged you out of your temporary guest session. Please click 'Sign in with Google' again to access your main account.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.subtitle: Verify and moderate store applications
admin.no_stores_found: No stores found in this category.
admin.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this store? This cannot be undone.
admin.footer_info: Admins can moderate all stores. Owners can only manage their own verified stores.

merchant.no_stores_desc: You haven't registered any stores yet. Expand your reach and list your business today!
merchant.no_stores_search_desc: We couldn't find any stores matching your search. Try looking for a different name or category.
merchant.default_desc: Provide a compelling description for your store to attract more local customers and boost your visibility.
merchant.branding_p: Your business is secured and verified. Manage your local listings with confidence.
merchant.delete_confirm_q: Are you sure you want to delete this store? This will also remove its application and products.
merchant.apply_desc: Join our ecosystem! Once approved, your store will be visible to all users nearby.
merchant.edit_desc: Update your store information to keep your customers informed.
merchant.insufficient_balance_subtitle: You need more fuel to view and process orders. Please refuel your tank to continue.
merchant.update_success_desc: Your changes have been saved successfully.
merchant.error_submitting: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
merchant.error_updating: Failed to update store. Please try again.
merchant.timeout_error: The request is taking longer than expected. Please check your connection.
merchant.map_link_placeholder: Paste map location link here (e.g. from Google or OSM)...
merchant.map_link_help: Paste a map link to automatically set coordinates.
merchant.location_denied: Location permission denied. Please allow access in browser settings.
merchant.location_timeout: Location detection timed out. Please try again.
merchant.location_required: Please provide an address or detect your location
merchant.direct_order_desc: Allow customers to place orders directly through the app.
merchant.direct_order_disclaimer_text: This functionality is for convenience only. As the store owner, you are in full control of and solely responsible for completing all orders. Communication and transactions are purely between you and the customer. The app facilitates the connection but does not manage fulfillment or payments.
merchant.direct_order_acknowledgement: I acknowledge that I am solely responsible for all direct orders and their completion.

product_manager.no_results: No results found for your current filters.
product_manager.warning_banner: Catalogue updates are live immediately. Ensure accurate pricing and stock levels to maintain your verified Merchant status and prevent customer disputes.
product_manager.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

delete_account_modal.title: Delete Account?
delete_account_modal.confirm: This action is permanent. All your lists, items, and profile information will be deleted forever.
delete_account_modal.reauth_required: For security, please sign out and sign back in before deleting your account.

tips.tip_stores: You can follow your favorite local shops to see their latest menu and special offers!
tips.tip_orders: Shared-Shopping-List isn't just for lists—you can place orders directly with neighborhood stores!
tips.tip_merchants: Invite your favorite local merchant to list their products here for free!
tips.tip_community: Finding and ordering from nearby shops helps strengthen your neighborhood economy.
tips.appeal: Loving the app? Share it with your neighbors and local shop owners to help our community grow!

store.secure_payment: Secure Payment via Google Play / App Store

order.no_orders_subtitle: Start shopping at our partner stores!
order.no_messages: No messages yet. Send a greeting!

store_profile.no_description: No description provided by the merchant.

discover_stores.title: Discover Stores
discover_stores.subtitle: Find products near you
discover_stores.footer: Showing stores open within 10 miles of your current location.

slides.collab_desc: Share lists with family and friends. Everyone sees updates in real-time — no more double-buying!
slides.control_desc: No annoying banners or popups. We only show a few short ads if you choose to watch one to refill your tank.
slides.design_desc: Focused on speed and clarity. A clean interface that helps you get through your shopping faster.
slides.smart_desc: Manage multiple lists for home, work, or parties. Simple, powerful, and completely free.
slides.loyalty_desc: Keep all your point cards in one place. Instant barcode access at checkout keeps your wallet light and organized.
slides.replication_desc: Digitize your physical loyalty cards in seconds. Replicate your entire wallet into your phone with our smart scanner.
slides.merchant_desc: List your menu, showcase your products, and receive delivery or reservation requests directly from the app.
slides.interests_desc: Select categories you're interested in to get personalized store suggestions.

install_banner.title: Install for the best experience
install_banner.subtitle: Get the full app experience on your home screen
